items.content:

items.title: 🎬 Golden Globes host Nikki Glaser vows not to mention Trump
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The red carpet for the 83rd edition of the Golden Globes was rolled out in Beverly Hills on January 8 ahead of the upcoming Hollywood award show.
 
Asked whether she plans on mentioning President Donald Trump, Nikki Glaser — who became the first woman to host the show solo in 2025 — said no.
 
#goldenglobes #nikkiglaser #trump #hollywood #donaldtrump

items.title: Why '6-7' isn't in the dictionary
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>In an era of search engines and algorithm-inspired slang, dictionaries can seem like analog relics. But for writer Stefan Fatsis — who embedded inside America’s oldest dictionary publisher, Merriam-Webster, for his new book “Unabridged” — they remain vital catalogues of language and, by extension, who we are as people.
 
#language #english #dictionary #meriamwebster #word</article>

items.title: Trump’s oil push, ICE shooting and Iran's protests
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump urges U.S. oil giants to pour $100 billion into Venezuela’s energy sector. Protests expected across the U.S. over fatal shooting of Renee Good by an ICE agent in Minneapolis. Swiss prosecutors detain the co‑owner of a ski resort bar where a New Year’s Eve fire killed 40 people. Plus, soaring gold prices spark a gold rush for a new generation of fortune hunters in Australia. 



Listen to the latest On Assignment on Trump and Venezuela (https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/trump-venezuela-2026-01-10/) .



Find our Morning Bid podcast ⁠⁠here⁠⁠ (https://nam02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Freuters.sng.link%2FEng86%2F0flfc%2Fr_b612e09fe6&data=05%7C02%7CDavid.Spencer%40thomsonreuters.com%7Cbc0f2d2bf58942294b9208de42f87434%7C62ccb8646a1a4b5d8e1c397dec1a8258%7C0%7C0%7C639021832033627144%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=Xq99GQZBfh3cfdUNwuI6i5Pe2jixT2ZhuN431beV%2B%2B8%3D&reserved=0) .

items.title: Australian bushfires raze homes, cut power to tens of thousands | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Thousands of firefighters battled bushfires in Australia's Victoria state that have razed homes, cut power to thousands of homes and torn through more than 741,316 acres of bushland.
